title: make image reference for commit optional
body:
to match docker compat, the image tag should be optional.

Fixes: #5027

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

LGTM
However, while testing I discovered an unrelated error with commit that should be touched up too.
https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5029
LGTM but I'd like a final review from someone more familiar with images
